meta.note: Data-provenance / completeness ledger for the dementia-exposome map. Per data type: national + sub-national source, year, and status. status: live=in the tool · seed=partial estimate · identified=source found, not yet wired · none=no data yet. 27 map countries hand-authored; ~146 other countries from an all-country WebSearch source audit (scripts/provenance-audit.json); MCI/SCD from a dedicated cognitive-impairment audit (scripts/provenance-audit-cognitive.json). See docs/side-projects/dementia-exposome/all-country-source-audit.md — modelled/latest-available estimates.
